overview.description: The FT Vest Laddered Autocallable Barrier & Resilient Income ETF (ACYS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund is an actively managed ETF aiming to provide income while limiting US equity downside volatility. The ETF uses derivatives to create a theoretically laddered portfolio of autocallable contracts. ACYS was launched on Apr 22, 2026 and is issued by First Trust.
